title: MapAndLocationSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents an org’s map and location settings.

enableAddressAutoComplete.description: Indicates whether auto-complete is enabled on address fields (true) or not (false).

enableMapsAndLocation.description: Indicates whether the maps and location services are enabled (true) or not (false)

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: This is a sample mapandlocation.settings metadata file.
